/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/core/StockRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/data/LiveDataProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/ui/InteractiveMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/ui/StockPrinter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/services/DataUpdater.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vestify.dir/src/services/StockScreener.cpp.o -o vestify  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
